pages.title: Flint Knapping
pages.text: $(bold)To begin:$()$(li)Place flint on a suitable block$(li)Hold a knapping tool and look at the flint$(li)Sneak-scroll, or use the Previous/Next Knapping Target controls without sneaking$(li)Use the flint four times to finish it$(p)The target controls default to F6/F7 and can be bound through Controlify or Steam Input.

pages.title: First Assembly
pages.text: Use the $(bold)Toolmaker's Station$() to combine prepared parts.$(p)Final statistics come from:$(li)Component materials$(li)Workmanship quality$(li)Finish$(li)Traits$(p)The displayed name or model alone never determines the stats.
